titleStmt.title: SII 19.51: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 51. (A.R. No. 276 of 1916.) TIRAKKŌL, WANDIWASH TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. ON THE EAST FACE OF THE BOULDER CONTAINING JAINA IMAGES.

summary.p: This is partly damaged. It seems to record some provision including (?) a gift of 200 sheep for the daily supply of 2 nāḻi of ghee and 10 nāḻi of oil to the Jaina temple•• Maiśitta-Perumbaḷḷi at Śrī-Daṇḍapuram in Poṉṉūr-nāḍu a subdivision of Veṇkuṉṟa-kōṭṭam, by one Eṟa-Nandi alias Naratoṅga-Pallavaraiyaṉ of Nelvēli in Nelvēli-nāḍu of Paṉaiyūr-nāḍu a division of Chōḷa-nāḍu. This Nelvēli is probably the same as one of the two villages of the name Nemmēli in the Nannilam and the Nagapattinam talukas of the Tanjavur district.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī(ri) . kopparakecaripa
ṉmaṟkku yāṇṭu muṉṟāvatu coḻanāṭṭu
t teṉkaraip paṉaiyūrnāṭṭu nelvelināṭṭu
nelveliyuṭaiyāṉ Eṟaṉantiyākiya naratoṅka
ppallavaraiyaṉ veṇkuṉṟakkoṭṭattu
p poṉṉūrnāṭṭu śrītaṇṭapurattu
maicitta perumpaḷḷi Irukkuṅ kura ṉārkku cantirāti
ttaruḷḷayaḷavun nicatippaṭi Aṭṭu ney Irunāḻiyum
Eṇṇai patiṉāḻiyum nicatippaṭi ṭuvatāka vai
ttāṉ Itu muṭṭāme Aṭṭuvippa runūṟu Āṭu
m koṇṭu Aṭṭuvippāṉṉāṉā Itu mu
ṭṭuvatāyil Ippaḷ
ḷikku miccavaiyārk
kum piḻaittārāvār
Ippaḷḷiyāḷar .
Digital edition of SII 19.51 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
